headline: Goldman sees earnings upside for these 2 IT Services stocks
summary: Investing.com -- In a note to clients on Friday, Goldman Sachs flagged modest earnings upside for IBM and Cognizant heading into first-quarter results, while warning that Globant faces downside risk from its exposure to pressured verticals and the Middle East conflict.

headline: Has The Recent Slide In Cognizant (CTSH) Created A Long Term Opportunity For Investors
summary: If you are wondering whether Cognizant Technology Solutions is now priced attractively or still has room to fall, the starting point is understanding what the current share price implies about its value. The stock last closed at US$59.20, with returns of 5.3% decline over the past week, 6.0% decline over the past month, 27.2% decline year to date, 13.3% decline over one year, a 2.7% gain over three years, and a 19.7% decline over five years. These recent moves may have changed how investors...
